MINI MINUTES:
Stephen Tye, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel and for good cause, the Court ordered the $400.00 sanction imposed on Steven M. Cvitanovic, Esq. for failure to appear at the Dec-18-2018 order to show cause hearing is rescinded. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
